channel.title: Mermaid to JSON Canvas on Anthony Vieira Vieira
channel.description: Recent content in Mermaid to JSON Canvas on Anthony Vieira Vieira

item.description:
Example Mermaid Diagrams for Testing

Basic Flowchart (Top-Down)

graph TD
 A[Start] --> B{Is it valid?}
 B -->|Yes| C[Process]
 B -->|No| D[Show Error]
 C --> E[End]
 D --> E

Flowchart with Colors (Left-Right)

graph LR
 A[Inicio] --> B{Decisión}
 B -->|Sí| C[Acción 1]
 B -->|No| D[Acción 2]
 C --> E[Fin]
 D --> E
 style C fill:#9f6
 style D fill:#f96

Complex Flowchart

graph TD
 A[User Login] --> B{Valid Credentials?}
 B -->|Yes| C[Dashboard]
 B -->|No| D[Error Message]
 C --> E{Logout?}
 E -->|Yes| F[Session Destroyed]
 E -->|No| C
 D --> A
 F --> A
 style C fill:#9f6
 style D fill:#f96
 style F fill:#69f

Testing Instructions

  1. Go to /tools/mermaid-to-canvas/
  2. Copy any of the examples above
  3. Paste into the Mermaid input textarea
  4. Select your preferred layout direction (TD or LR)
  5. Click Convert
  6. Preview the diagram and check the JSON output
  7. Click Copy JSON to copy the output
  8. Save as needed or use in your application

Implementation Summary

✅ Completed Implementation

Files Created

  1. content/tools/mermaid-to-canvas/_index.md

    • Tool page with HTML UI
    • Frontmatter with external scripts configuration
    • Direction selector (TD/LR radio buttons)
    • Input/output textareas
    • Action buttons (Convert, Copy, Clear)
    • Preview section

  2. static/js/tools/mermaid-converter.js

    • Mermaid code parser
    • Graph data extraction (nodes and edges)
    • Layout calculation with dagre
    • JSON Canvas generation
    • Clipboard copy
    • Live preview rendering
    • Error handling

  3. content/tools/mermaid-to-canvas/examples.md

    • Example Mermaid diagrams for testing
    • Usage instructions

  4. content/tools/mermaid-to-canvas/README.md

    • Complete documentation
    • Feature list
    • Usage guide
    • Technical details
    • Troubleshooting

Files Modified

  1. layouts/page/tools.html

Mermaid to JSON Canvas Converter

Overview

This tool converts Mermaid flowchart diagrams into JSON Canvas format.

Features

  • ✅ Convert Mermaid flowcharts to JSON Canvas format
  • ✅ Support for TD (Top-Down) and LR (Left-Right) layouts
  • ✅ Automatic node positioning using dagre layout engine
  • ✅ Edge labels support
  • ✅ Color mapping from Mermaid styles to Canvas presets
  • ✅ Live preview with Mermaid rendering
  • ✅ Copy JSON to clipboard

Usage

  1. Enter Mermaid Code: Paste your Mermaid flowchart definition in the input textarea
  2. Select Layout Direction: Choose between TD (Top-Down) or LR (Left-Right)
  3. Convert: Click the Convert button to generate JSON Canvas
  4. Preview: View the rendered diagram in the preview section
  5. Copy JSON: Click “Copy JSON” to copy to clipboard
  6. Use Output: Paste the JSON into your application or save manually as needed

Example

Input (Mermaid):
